findings.text: Applicant reported monthly accommodation costs of £5,526.66 in the hardship application.
Applicant reported monthly student loan/bursary income of £770.00 from SAAS/SFE/SFW/SFNI/SUSI.
Applicant holds a Monzo bank account with a current balance of £0.38.
No bank statement or tenancy agreement provided in this work order to cross-reference the reported accommodation cost.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Cross-Reference: Accommodation Cost vs. Bank Statements and Tenancy Agreement

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0008 (Living Cost Questions - Trimester 2)

**Reported Accommodation Cost:** £5,526.66 per month

**Reported Student Loan/Bursary Income:** £770.00 per month

**Bank Account:** Monzo, balance £0.38

**Finding:** The reported accommodation cost (£5,526.66) far exceeds the reported student loan income (£770.00) and the bank balance (£0.38). No bank statement or tenancy agreement was available in this work order to verify the accommodation cost. A follow-up task is needed to obtain and cross-reference the actual bank statements and tenancy agreement.
proposed_artifacts.title: Accommodation Cost Cross-Reference Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Obtain the applicant's Monzo bank statements (last 30 days) and the tenancy agreement for the accommodation. Cross-reference the actual rent payment transactions with the reported accommodation cost of £5,526.66. Verify the tenancy agreement terms, including rent amount, parties, and property address. Flag any discrepancies.
proposed_tasks.title: Obtain bank statements and tenancy agreement for accommodation cost verification

risk_flags.description: Reported accommodation cost (£5,526.66) is extremely high relative to student loan income (£770.00) and bank balance (£0.38), suggesting possible data entry error or need for verification.

summary: Applicant reported monthly accommodation costs of £5,526.66 and student loan income of £770.00, with a Monzo bank balance of £0.38. No bank statements or tenancy agreement were provided in this work order to verify the accommodation cost. A follow-up task is proposed to obtain and cross-reference these documents.

uncertainties.description: No bank statement or tenancy agreement was available in this work order to verify the reported accommodation cost of £5,526.66.
uncertainties.impact: Cannot confirm the accuracy of the reported accommodation cost or the terms of the tenancy.

uncertainties.description: The reported accommodation cost (£5,526.66) is unusually high and may be a data entry error (e.g., entered as annual instead of monthly).
uncertainties.impact: The financial picture may be materially misstated.
